text.title: Requirements Prioritization Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: pick-method
step.action: MoSCoW for ≤20 items, RICE for product context, WSJF for large dependency graphs.

step.name: review-with-stakeholders
step.action: Walk through bucket boundaries; capture redlines.
